programme.title: E474
programme.desc: CULTURAL CANVAS: Cultural Canvas is a flagship cultural program of Phoenix TV deeply beloved by young audiences as their window to engage with and understand traditional culture. programme.title: E7 - Victoria: The Southern Melting Pot
programme.desc: Sara goes to Melbourne to explore the food culture and find the best local ingredients. First stop, the Queen Victoria Market.

programme.title: E8 - Victoria: Culinary Roadtrip
programme.desc: Sara heads to Victoria where she visits the farms and wineries, which she finds after travelling inland from the Great Ocean Road. She is planning to visit the restaurant Brae, which is run by an unknown chef.

programme.title: E4 - Gareth Southgate
programme.desc: In Bear’s Mission with Gareth Southgate, the leader of the Three Lions squad will swap the football field for some of the UK’s toughest terrain and tackle the ultimate challenge, as he joins Bear on a mission across the wilds of Dartmoor.

programme.title: E6 - Highlight 6
programme.desc: This week a heavy rescue like no other – as father and son Dave and Adam Crouch team up to save a lorry transporting a train from sinking into soft ground. Crouch Recovery Op Jim must rescue a lorry from a ditch after the driver attempted an ill-advised three-point turn. And while Rory moves an antique fire engine for the boss, Fluff must get rid of a lorry load of stinking cheese…

programme.title: E2 - Feral Hogs
programme.desc: The feral hog is one of the most formidable species on the planet. Possessing a unique combination of high reproductive capacity, size, and adaptability, the feral hog absolutely decimates entire ecosystems. With pork chops on his mind, Yia travels to the Florida/Alabama border to join Jennifer Bearden and Zack Franks who are doing their part to help control the rampant feral hog population menacing Florida.

programme.title: E1 - Black Bear & Wild Rice
programme.desc: Daniel takes on the profound challenge of a bear hunt with fellow hunter and houndsman Sam. He also explores traditional methods for harvesting delicious wild rice with Arthur, Avani and Sara.

programme.title: E2 - Northern Territory
programme.desc: In Kakadu National Park, Andy joins Dewayne Webb foraging pandanus and cooking Seared Buffalo with Pandanus & Charred Herb Salsa over an open fire. He then heads to Darwin, assisting Zach Green at Elijah’s Kitchen, a food truck offering indigenous-inspired meals like Magpie Goose and Crocodile Laksa. Returning to Kakadu, Andy goes fishing with local Barramundi expert Rob Johnson and prepares Paperbark Leaf BBQ Barramundi with Sour Tamarind Sauce at Anbangbang Billabong, showcasing the region's environment and produce.

programme.title: E8 - Kick the Bucket-List
programme.desc: For a thrill-seeking grandfather of two, there’s no such thing as retiring from life, but leave it to Bear Grylls to surprise even the most experienced adventurer. Together, they go full throttle to fulfill Art’s bucket list and capture a story worth telling his grandson back home.

programme.title: E13
programme.desc: 《超時空羅曼史》講述了民國功夫巨星向秦羽，因一場意外來到21世紀，與十八線編劇金阿銀相遇，兩人展開了奇妙浪漫又充滿戲劇性的愛情故事。

programme.title: E13
programme.desc: 《超時空羅曼史》講述了民國功夫巨星向秦羽，因一場意外來到21世紀，與十八線編劇金阿銀相遇，兩人展開了奇妙浪漫又充滿戲劇性的愛情故事。

programme.title: E35
programme.desc: 潘岩(郭麒麟 飾)在機緣巧合下進入榮柯律所實習，認識了高冷女神左娜(金晨 飾)、學霸舒一南(晏紫東 飾)等一批年輕人。他們在資深前輩易帆(朱珠飾)、杜飛宇(張子賢飾)等人的帶領下，經歷了職場的波折坎坷和困難考驗，一起並肩作戰，互相學習成長，憑著熱情拼搏的職場精神，在情與法、義與利的境地裡突圍，更堅定了對法律的崇高信仰，同時也對自身的突破與飛躍有了新的認識與感悟，於職場和生活的路上守望初心，在平凡中創造不凡的「奮逗」故事。

programme.title: E35
programme.desc: 潘岩(郭麒麟 飾)在機緣巧合下進入榮柯律所實習，認識了高冷女神左娜(金晨 飾)、學霸舒一南(晏紫東 飾)等一批年輕人。他們在資深前輩易帆(朱珠飾)、杜飛宇(張子賢飾)等人的帶領下，經歷了職場的波折坎坷和困難考驗，一起並肩作戰，互相學習成長，憑著熱情拼搏的職場精神，在情與法、義與利的境地裡突圍，更堅定了對法律的崇高信仰，同時也對自身的突破與飛躍有了新的認識與感悟，於職場和生活的路上守望初心，在平凡中創造不凡的「奮逗」故事。

programme.title: E13
programme.desc: 《超時空羅曼史》講述了民國功夫巨星向秦羽，因一場意外來到21世紀，與十八線編劇金阿銀相遇，兩人展開了奇妙浪漫又充滿戲劇性的愛情故事。

programme.title: E201 - The Star Games
programme.desc: Patrick forces his entire family to participate in a series of different game show challenges.

programme.title: E110 - Hand-Me-Downer
programme.desc: After Lincoln gets a pink hand-me-down bike from Lori, he borrows Lynn’s cool BMX bike without telling her.

programme.title: E101 - Pilot
programme.desc: After Tori fills in for her ailing sister in a big musical showcase, Tori is asked to enroll at an elite performing arts high school. But once there, Tori struggles to fit in to her new surroundings.

programme.title: E204 - Caught Rubber - Handed / And...Action!
programme.desc: Chuck moves in with the Wylde-Paks after Lil & Jack accidentally destroy his house. They must hide his awful roommate habits from their parents. // Seeking closure on her favorite K-Drama, Lily films her own finale with her family as the cast & crew.

programme.title: E105 - Squidina's Little Helper / I Smell a Pat
programme.desc: The Patrick Star Show is interrupted by a most peculiar stench. // Squidina hires an assistant who's a little too good at his job.

programme.title: E910 - Gags To Riches / Sole Searching
programme.desc: After Luan pranks Grouse with a fake lottery ticket, she has to deal with the consequences of his massive shopping spree. // Lynn desperately searches for a popular brand of basketball shoes after she narrowly misses out on buying a pair.

programme.title: E204 - Caught Rubber - Handed / And...Action!
programme.desc: Chuck moves in with the Wylde-Paks after Lil & Jack accidentally destroy his house. They must hide his awful roommate habits from their parents. // Seeking closure on her favorite K-Drama, Lily films her own finale with her family as the cast & crew.

programme.title: E305 - The Dirty Bubble Bass / Sheldon SquarePants
programme.desc: Bubble Bass and the Dirty Bubble team up to become Bikini Bottom's nastiest nefarious nuisance. // Plankton joins the SquarePants family in the hope of becoming closer to SpongeBob (and the secret formula).

programme.title: E813 - The Cling and I
programme.desc: Lana struggles to shake off Lily when she starts to follow Lana around like a shadow.

programme.title: E111 - Best Fwends / The Trivialist Pursuit
programme.desc: Bester's new pet comes between her and her brother. There's nothing to it, Best must splat the cockroach! // Best and Bester go on an epic quest for a talking whale to prove they answered a board game question correctly.

programme.title: E310 - Green Fingers
programme.desc: After Schwoz creates a disease that accidentally effects Charlotte, Henry, his family, and even Ray, he quarantines them in Henry’s house in order to find a cure.

programme.title: E102 - Jade the Influencer / Restaurant Review
programme.desc: Bibi goes live, but when she's not getting enough likes Twister steps in to help, and is almost unmasked. // Gran Gran's convinced the Chahuta and won't impress a food critic, so tries to change things.

programme.title: E910 - Gags To Riches / Sole Searching
programme.desc: After Luan pranks Grouse with a fake lottery ticket, she has to deal with the consequences of his massive shopping spree. // Lynn desperately searches for a popular brand of basketball shoes after she narrowly misses out on buying a pair.

programme.title: E703 - Candy Crushed / Master of Delusion
programme.desc: Lola struggles to dampen her sweet tooth when mom challenges her to go an entire week without sugar. // Lincoln strives to impress the Amazing Brailster when he's chosen to be his assistant at the Illusion Chateau.

programme.title: E105 - Squidina's Little Helper / I Smell a Pat
programme.desc: The Patrick Star Show is interrupted by a most peculiar stench. // Squidina hires an assistant who's a little too good at his job.

programme.title: Panda and Macaw
programme.desc: Posse, the red panda, and Santiago, the saki, have been having issues with their teeth and the dentist brought his big pliers! Ever heard the tale of how the blue-throated macaw parrot was saved from extinction and started a new fashion trend in the process?

programme.title: Quebec
programme.desc: Quebec winter thrill: Dogsledding, ice sculpting, hockey lesson with local teens, and extreme sledding at Village Vacances Valcartier. A week of icy adventures with Nicole in Canada!

programme.title: Earth's Orbit
programme.desc: Kit is stuck at the Earth's orbit. Gravity is pulling him down so he looks to the International Space Station for help. A local robot helps him escape the unforgiving forces of gravity.

programme.title: Be In My Video
programme.desc: Flippy and Motor just finished their best track ever and want a video to match. Flippy dreams big-boats, mansions, even space! But Motor suggests something cheaper: animation. With help from friends, they set out to make a music video that's going to be so cool!

programme.title: The Deadly Zombie Fungus
programme.desc: The Cordyceps fungal spores are capable of controlling and killing insects. They enter the insect's body and digest it from the inside. They can even steer its mind and make it do things that help spread the spores further.

programme.title: An Oldie but a Gooey
programme.desc: Darwin and Newts meet Pupu Rangi's grandma, Kuia Gooey, and discover there's so much that our grandparents can teach us.

programme.title: How Does a Rocket Escape Earth's Gravity
programme.desc: Leaving our planet and entering space is extremely difficult, requiring complex mathematics to calculate the amount of opposing force to escape the Earth's gravity. Just try jumping upwards. So how does mathematics help rockets beat gravity and shoot out into space?

programme.title: The Day Henry Met... A Shield
programme.desc: Henry meets a friendly Shield. Shield tells Henry about a missing Sword kidnapped by a ferocious Dragon.

programme.title: Could We Do Without Plankton?
programme.desc: Plankton are the foundations of the ocean food chain. Without them, pretty much nothing could survive. A single teaspoon of sea water can contain over one million living organisms.

programme.title: The Enchanted Forest
programme.desc: A group of young adventurers explore the largest evergreen moist forest in South Africa, in Garden Route National Park. Along the way they go zip lining, find a massive tree and spot signs of the legendary Knysna elephants.

programme.title: An Oldie but a Gooey
programme.desc: Darwin and Newts meet Pupu Rangi's grandma, Kuia Gooey, and discover there's so much that our grandparents can teach us.

programme.title: How Does a Rocket Escape Earth's Gravity
programme.desc: Leaving our planet and entering space is extremely difficult, requiring complex mathematics to calculate the amount of opposing force to escape the Earth's gravity. Just try jumping upwards. So how does mathematics help rockets beat gravity and shoot out into space?

programme.title: Panda and Macaw
programme.desc: Posse, the red panda, and Santiago, the saki, have been having issues with their teeth and the dentist brought his big pliers! Ever heard the tale of how the blue-throated macaw parrot was saved from extinction and started a new fashion trend in the process?

programme.title: Orca Baby
programme.desc: Morgan, the deaf orca, is about to give birth to her very first calf. The stakes are high, and the staff at Loro Parque are holding their collective breath as the scene is set for the greatest natural phenomenon in the zoo's history.

programme.title: Treasure Story
programme.desc: While searching for treasure on the beach, Smorph imagines the story of how a brave submarine used a light-up shield to scare off a sub eating shark!

programme.title: Day of the Eco-Warrior
programme.desc: Ricky is surprised to find out that Rich wants to live off the land and become one with nature. It inspires Ricky to make a pineapple plant pot while the Grand Master crafted some truly magnificent blooming flowers.

programme.title: Cat Maze
programme.desc: OEistein makes a cardboard cat maze.

programme.title: Are Hot Springs Magical?
programme.desc: The Grand Prismatic Spring of Yellowstone National Park in the USA is a rainbow coloured hot spring. The colours are caused by heat loving organisms known as Cyanobacteria and various other bacteria and organisms which contain different types of coloured chemicals.

programme.title: The Hottentots Holland Mountains - Unfinished Business
programme.desc: After courageously jumping into the Point of No Return, the team negotiate whirlpools and hurl themselves over vertical cliffs into deep pools far below. Finally they reach the river's end – victorious and beaming with joy, they make their way back to the Zebrabus.

programme.title: The Deadly Zombie Fungus
programme.desc: The Cordyceps fungal spores are capable of controlling and killing insects. They enter the insect's body and digest it from the inside. They can even steer its mind and make it do things that help spread the spores further.

programme.title: Kogelberg - Source To Sea
programme.desc: The youngsters set off through difficult terrain before taking on fearsome rapids. Their journey takes them through a plant kingdom filled with thousands of unique plants and animals, including an unusual sea bird that cannot fly. Can you guess what animal it might be?

programme.title: Self-Portrait
programme.desc: This episode shows how an artist can determine the accurate placement of eyes, ears, nose, chin, and lips on portraits by using proportions. We show you how you can do the same by just using a string and applying some rules about the human body.

programme.title: It's Not a Phase
programme.desc: Doodle Girl helps the boy band Drawn 4Gether by doodling a stage, microphones, and an audience so their concert can go on perfectly.

programme.title: Are Hot Springs Magical?
programme.desc: The Grand Prismatic Spring of Yellowstone National Park in the USA is a rainbow coloured hot spring. The colours are caused by heat loving organisms known as Cyanobacteria and various other bacteria and organisms which contain different types of coloured chemicals.

programme.title: Revisiting the Cough - The Best Bits
programme.desc: In the last episode, the doctors look back at their favourite bits of the season - including what happens when you cough and the life-changing operation that allows someone to hear for the very first time. There's a new mind-bending trick, and the Ouch-Mobile is open.

programme.title: E5 - Sanctuary
programme.desc: There’s strength in numbers. Especially in the wild. For many species, it’s the very reason why individuals come together. Protecting the empire is imperative to survival. For these animals, protection means isolation – finding sanctuary from the threats outside their boundaries.

programme.title: E1 - A Wild Education
programme.desc: Welcome baby orangutan Topan, an orphan in need of a surrogate mom. Watch her learning journey in nursery school while her fellow students move through junior, senior, and wild-immersion schools. Meanwhile, 16-year-old Kasper preps for graduation.

programme.title: E2 - Lean on Me
programme.desc: Observe blossoming friendships and interspecies bonds in nursery school, and peek inside a bromance among junior-school buds Valentino, Yutris and Madara. See distractible Beni lean into his love of food and get a beating from a more-senior pupil.

programme.title: E3 - Villains
programme.desc: Meet nature’s most wanted and see why the baddest of the bad don’t get the respect they deserve. Admire the great white shark’s electrical sensors, the razor-sharp limbs of the dead leaf mantis, and the zombie-creating powers of cordyceps fungi.

programme.title: E3 - The Mating Game
programme.desc: Meet Madonna, a very special monkey. She’s the first Kinda baboon ever to be studied from birth to adulthood and now, critically, she’s looking for a mate. Only recently identified as a species in their own right, Kinda baboons are little known and little understood. But Madonna is helping change all that. She may just hold the key to unlocking the secrets of the Kinda’s unique female-male relationships. These are baboons like no others.

programme.title: E3 - Interior
programme.desc: Some of the most interesting adaptations in the animal world are completely invisible. Study these hidden, internal alterations to see how different animals have evolved to survive in amazing and unseen ways.

programme.title: E2 - Lemurs of Madagascar
programme.desc: The island is the land of Lemurs. Lemurs are fascinating arboreal primitive primates of Madagascar represented in all sizes, colors, and shapes from the largest Indri to the tiny mouse lemur.

programme.title: E3 - The Mating Game
programme.desc: Meet Madonna, a very special monkey. She’s the first Kinda baboon ever to be studied from birth to adulthood and now, critically, she’s looking for a mate. She may just hold the key to unlocking the secrets of the Kinda’s unique female-male relationships. These are baboons like no others.

programme.title: Osprey: Sea Raptor
programme.desc: Wade into a saltwater marsh along the Connecticut River to witness the heartwarming reunion of two ospreys who’ve been mates for a decade. Witness their highs and lows over a single summer as they raise their chicks and dodge a host of predators.

programme.desc: Wade into a saltwater marsh along the Connecticut River to witness the heartwarming reunion of two ospreys who’ve been mates for a decade. Witness their highs and lows over a single summer as they raise their chicks and dodge a host of predators.

programme.title: Osprey: Sea Raptor
programme.desc: Wade into a saltwater marsh along the Connecticut River to witness the heartwarming reunion of two ospreys who’ve been mates for a decade. Witness their highs and lows over a single summer as they raise their chicks and dodge a host of predators.

programme.title: E5 - Sanctuary
programme.desc: There’s strength in numbers. Especially in the wild. For many species, it’s the very reason why individuals come together. Protecting the empire is imperative to survival. For these animals, protection means isolation – finding sanctuary from the threats outside their boundaries.

programme.title: E5 - Sanctuary
programme.desc: There’s strength in numbers. Especially in the wild. For many species, it’s the very reason why individuals come together. Protecting the empire is imperative to survival. For these animals, protection means isolation – finding sanctuary from the threats outside their boundaries.

programme.title: E1 - A Wild Education
programme.desc: Welcome baby orangutan Topan, an orphan in need of a surrogate mom. Watch her learning journey in nursery school while her fellow students move through junior, senior, and wild-immersion schools. Meanwhile, 16-year-old Kasper preps for graduation.

programme.title: E2 - Lean on Me
programme.desc: Observe blossoming friendships and interspecies bonds in nursery school, and peek inside a bromance among junior-school buds Valentino, Yutris and Madara. See distractible Beni lean into his love of food and get a beating from a more-senior pupil.

programme.title: E3 - Villains
programme.desc: Meet nature’s most wanted and see why the baddest of the bad don’t get the respect they deserve. Admire the great white shark’s electrical sensors, the razor-sharp limbs of the dead leaf mantis, and the zombie-creating powers of cordyceps fungi.

programme.title: E3 - The Mating Game
programme.desc: Meet Madonna, a very special monkey. She’s the first Kinda baboon ever to be studied from birth to adulthood and now, critically, she’s looking for a mate. Only recently identified as a species in their own right, Kinda baboons are little known and little understood. But Madonna is helping change all that. She may just hold the key to unlocking the secrets of the Kinda’s unique female-male relationships. These are baboons like no others.

programme.title: E3 - Interior
programme.desc: Some of the most interesting adaptations in the animal world are completely invisible. Study these hidden, internal alterations to see how different animals have evolved to survive in amazing and unseen ways.

programme.title: E2 - Lemurs of Madagascar
programme.desc: The island is the land of Lemurs. Lemurs are fascinating arboreal primitive primates of Madagascar represented in all sizes, colors, and shapes from the largest Indri to the tiny mouse lemur.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE delivers the latest from Japan, Asia, and the rest of the world. While covering wide network of correspondents breaking news and developing stories, offering a perspective from this corner of the globe, a team of trusted anchors ties it all together to give you a picture of what's happening now, and what's ahead.

It's Showtime Live[Live]
programme.desc: The venue for Pinoys to strut and display their unique talents for all the world to see. Led by a powerhouse cast of popular celebrities - Vhong Navarro, Anne Curtis, Ogie Alcasid, Karylle, Jhong Hilario and Vice Ganda to name a few.

programme.title: The Alibi[Live]
programme.desc: Vincent, an heir to a news empire, gets accused of killing his rival, Walter. To protect his reputation, he hires Stella, an escort with her own haunted past, to pose as his alibi. What begins as a transactional arrangement soon becomes dangerously real as their shared wounds and ambitions draw them together. But when they uncover the truth, the two are compelled to confront their true feelings.

programme.title: Tubig To Handle
programme.desc: Get ready to get soaked! 💦 Experience the wettest, wildest, and wackiest game show in the Philippines - Tubig To Handle!. Watch as fearless contestants dive headfirst into epic water obstacle challenges, face hilarious wipeouts, and battle it out for BIG prizes. From slippery slides to heart-pumping showdowns, every episode is packed with non-stop action, laughter, and pure Pinoy fun. Hosted by Yassi Pressman and your favorite stars, this splash-filled adventure is guaranteed to bring nonstop laughter, thrills, and all-out water fun like never before!

programme.title: Juan Conversations With Rose Eclarinal S3
programme.desc: The show highlights the personal journeys, challenges and truimphs of ordinary and extraordinary overseas Filipinos. Produced and hosted by Rose Eclarinal

programme.title: Soco[Live]
programme.desc: The iconic investigative docudrama returns with gripping interviews and reenactments of real-life crimes. Veteran host Gus Abelgas is joined by ABS-CBN's top crime reporters: Zyan Ambrosio, Dennis Datu, Jeff Caparas, Lyza Aquino and Jessie Cruzat.

programme.title: E58
programme.desc: 專為資深單身人士定制的相親交友節目，每集有4位男嘉賓和3位女嘉賓，依序進行一對一交流。未上場嘉賓則分別在男女嘉賓室觀察場上溝通情況，加深對有意對象的瞭解。節目主張為愛回歸，愛情不分年齡，緣來從來不晚。

programme.title: E58
programme.desc: 專為資深單身人士定制的相親交友節目，每集有4位男嘉賓和3位女嘉賓，依序進行一對一交流。未上場嘉賓則分別在男女嘉賓室觀察場上溝通情況，加深對有意對象的瞭解。節目主張為愛回歸，愛情不分年齡，緣來從來不晚。

programme.title: E5 - 伊芙又走上了爸媽的套路
programme.desc: 由伊能靜擔任團長，董璇、喬杉、李嘉格、余宇涵、沈奕斐等擔任觀察員，以「爸爸圖鑑」為主題，通過展現不同家庭的相處模式，聚焦三位背景各異、育兒方式不同的父親，記錄他們真實的帶娃日常，展現多元的家庭教育模式與溫馨的成長故事。

programme.title: E7 - 愛是什麼 由你定義
programme.desc: 五位全新的音樂人梁龍、胡夏、白舉綱、希林娜依·高、黃子弘凡以歌手形象反轉擔任Live House工作人員，以全新的姿態再度開啟這趟音樂旅程。同時，帶著全新口號「總有快樂發聲」，一起共同見證更多生活中的美好與驚喜。

programme.title: Légendes urbaines
programme.desc: Un moment dédié pour donner la parole aux grands acteurs des cultures urbaines mondiales. Ils sont les têtes d'affiches des genres musicaux les plus écoutés aujourd'hui mais sont parfois méconnus du grand public. Une découverte de la face cachée' de ces artistes, derrière les clichés, les postures, et loin de l'actualité promotionnelle.'

programme.title: Sports
programme.desc: Un suivi de toutes les news sportives et les résultats avec ce magazine animé par des spécialistes du football, du basketball, du tennis et du cyclisme.

programme.title: Légendes urbaines
programme.desc: Un moment dédié pour donner la parole aux grands acteurs des cultures urbaines mondiales. Ils sont les têtes d'affiches des genres musicaux les plus écoutés aujourd'hui mais sont parfois méconnus du grand public. Une découverte de la face cachée' de ces artistes, derrière les clichés, les postures, et loin de l'actualité promotionnelle.'

programme.title: L'instant mobile
programme.desc: Une émission d'information au format court qui traite des sujets les plus captivants venus du monde entier. À travers des reportages dynamiques et un regard incisif, elle propose un condensé de l'actualité internationale pour rester informé rapidement et efficacement.

programme.title: Autour du monde : le journal[Live]
programme.desc: Les informations qui font la une aux quatre coins du monde sont décryptées à travers des reportages, des analyses approfondies et le travail de correspondants internationaux. Un regard global et complet sur l'actualité pour mieux comprendre les événements qui façonnent notre époque.

E5 - The Helmet Of Will
programme.desc: On the verge of death, Will makes an oath to Gracefeel. He rises up again and challenges Stagnate who then disappears.

programme.title: E3 - The Ghost Of Martel
programme.desc: Allen and Kanda investigate town Martel and find an Innocence taken by the Akuma. Kanda refuses to help Allen and leaves with the Martel residents.

programme.title: E6 - Are You Really This Stupid?
programme.desc: Momiji invites Tohru and the Somas to the vacation house for a holiday, but Tohru has to finish her homework first.

programme.title: E1 - Marie And Shion
programme.desc: Shion is disappointed that magic doesn't exist. One day, his sister takes him to a lake after witnessing a phenomenon.

programme.title: E2 - There Is No Magic In This Other World
programme.desc: Shion makes a few discoveries after witnessing the lumination at the lake, and he practises to move on to the next step.

programme.title: E4 - Magical Research Begins In Earnest
programme.desc: Shion is thrilled to discover his new magic. On the other hand, Marie practises fencing to shake off the bad memory.

programme.title: E52 - Unexpected Relanding! Luffy, To Marineford!
programme.desc: Brannew briefs Marineford HQ on Luffy's stunt days ago when he appeared there with Rayleigh and Jimbei.

programme.title: E26 - Fairy Tale

programme.title: E25 - Ragdoll
programme.desc: Dad agrees to take Bluey and Bingo to the shops to buy an ice-cream if they can get him into the car. Only problem is... he's just entered 'Ragdoll' mode!

programme.title: E20 - The Midnight Badge
programme.desc: Loveable Duggee and the Squirrels return with more educational fun.

programme.title: E23 - Queens
programme.desc: During a game of Queens, Bluey and Bingo find that playing the butler is much more fun. But someone must play the queen, even if it means not being afraid of a bit of hard work.

programme.title: E38 - Cubby
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo build a very special cubby for their stuffed toy Kimjim.

programme.title: E47 - The Party Badge
programme.desc: Bing Bong - there's somebody at the door. It's delivery Chipmunk with a parcel for Duggee, but why is it wrapped up like a present? Maybe its Duggee's birthday!

programme.title: E46 - The Playing Badge
programme.desc: The squirrels are playing in the clubhouse. Naughty Monkey arrives and causes chaos! He later returns to his home to relax when there is a knock at his door. It's his cousins, come to visit.

programme.title: E5 - The Continent Of Europe
programme.desc: The Go Jetters help Grandmaster Glitch take his own souvenir selfies across Europe.

programme.title: E5 - Train Fudge
programme.desc: Sarah and Duck take an unexpected train trip whilst on their quest to buy some fudge.

programme.title: E7 - Library Book
programme.desc: Stanley must track down the missing library book, 'The Little Book of New Things to Do'. He visits various townsfolk who have leant the book to each other.

programme.desc: Werewolves, cobras, alligators, and commando dragons! The animals chat about all the things which absolutely do not make them scared.

programme.desc: Love and peace symbol, Lychee, performs his song - 'All You Need is Lychee!'

E5 - Imagination & Problem Solving Fun!
programme.desc: Join Baby John for some imagination & problem-solving fun! Oh no, Teddy is missing! But don't worry, Mom, Dad, Jack & Jill are all there to help Baby John search for him & solve the mystery. Then, dressed as pigs, Baby John, Jack & Jill use their imagination to re-enact the classic 'Three Little Pigs' story, with Dad playing the Big Bad Wolf! The problem-solving continues as the family helps guide Jill through the experience of losing her first tooth.

programme.title: E2 - Zero Gravity, Shrink Rays & More Mayhem!
programme.desc: Get ready for some sci-fi mayhem with Arpo & Baby Daniel! The chaos begins when Daniel accidentally switches Arpo to zero-gravity mode, causing the robot & everything he touches to float around the city! Then, Arpo accidentally shrinks Baby Daniel with a shrink ray & has to search frantically for the tiny toddler. The out-of-this-world adventure continues when the pesky squirrel takes Daniel on an unexpected trip to outer space in a make-believe rocket!

programme.title: E2 - Gecko vs Weasel: Ultimate Rivalry
programme.desc: The ultimate rivalry between Gecko & Mr. Weasel heats up! After a big rainstorm, Weasel challenges Gecko to a head-to-head car wash competition. Then, Weasel decides he wants a Mechanical of his own, so he hatches a scheme to try & steal Gecko's secret plans! The rivalry continues as Weasel tries to show off his new sports car but gets stuck, & his automated car wash mistakes Weasel for his car!

programme.title: E1 - A Day of Food, Play & Learning!
programme.desc: Join the kids for a day of food, play & learning! First, Grandma Panda bakes some cupcakes while Mia & Bari role-play as bakers in their own pretend kitchen & play a game of pat-a-cake. Then, it's time for a teddy bear's picnic with a whole variety of different tasty treats! The learning continues as Daddy & Twinkle show Max how to say hello with a wave before going into town to wave hello to all their friends. It's a fun-filled, yummy day!

programme.title: E1 - A Super Fun Underwater Sing-Along!
programme.desc: Get ready for a super fun underwater sing-along with The Sharksons! Join the fun as five little reef sharks learn their lesson about jumping on the bed. Then, meet an 'Itsy Bitsy' sea spider who keeps trying to climb an underwater cliff with a little help from her friends! The classic rhymes continue with a curious crab acting out the story of Humpty Dumpty & a cozy pajama party with ten friends in a bed. It's a sing-along full of classic tunes with a fun, fishy twist!

programme.title: E5 - An Adventure, Pedals, Rescue & Stars!
programme.desc: Join the Minibods for an adventure with pedals, rescues & stars! Lulu goes camping but realizes she's left her favorite Binky Bunny behind & has to learn how to cope. Then, Newt goes on an adventure to find a real-life Flutterbug, but she has to be brave when her bike's stabilizers come off! The adventures continue as Jeff overcomes his fear of mud to rescue his feather duster & Bubbles builds a rocket to try & reach a big purple star in the sky!

programme.title: E4 - Answering Big Questions!
programme.desc: Blippi is answering some of life's biggest questions! He shrinks down for a night adventure in a mouth to learn the right way to brush teeth from Bill Brushy. Then, he flies up a nose to find out what makes us sneeze! His curiosity continues as he learns how a fly can walk upside down on the ceiling, discovers the artistic process of how spiders make their webs & even becomes a contestant on a game show to learn the difference between fruits & vegetables!

programme.title: E3 - Learning, Growing & Having Fun!
programme.desc: Buster is learning, growing & having fun! First, he gets covered in mud & needs to get clean, but he's frightened by the big, noisy carwash! He has to work up the courage to try it himself. Then, after eating too many sweets, Buster gets a sore tooth & Amber the Ambulance teaches him the importance of keeping his teeth clean. In a race against Terry Tractor, Buster also learns that slow & steady can sometimes win the race!

programme.title: E2 - Gecko vs Weasel: Ultimate Rivalry
programme.desc: The ultimate rivalry between Gecko & Mr. Weasel heats up! After a big rainstorm, Weasel challenges Gecko to a head-to-head car wash competition. Then, Weasel decides he wants a Mechanical of his own, so he hatches a scheme to try & steal Gecko's secret plans! The rivalry continues as Weasel tries to show off his new sports car but gets stuck, & his automated car wash mistakes Weasel for his car!

programme.title: E5 - Imagination & Problem Solving Fun!
programme.desc: Join Baby John for some imagination & problem-solving fun! Oh no, Teddy is missing! But don't worry, Mom, Dad, Jack & Jill are all there to help Baby John search for him & solve the mystery. Then, dressed as pigs, Baby John, Jack & Jill use their imagination to re-enact the classic 'Three Little Pigs' story, with Dad playing the Big Bad Wolf! The problem-solving continues as the family helps guide Jill through the experience of losing her first tooth.

programme.title: E34 - Flight Of The Buffalo Wing
programme.desc: Before chicken wings were America's favourite Sunday football snack, they were considered an undesirable cut of meat until two restaurateurs in Buffalo, New York, reinvented the way wings are cooked.

programme.title: E15 - Rise Of The Office Machines
programme.desc: To simplify tedious office tasks in the mid-20th century, one unknown company introduces the world's first photocopier and becomes a household name, which kicks off a rivalry between two iconic brands.

programme.title: E2 - Philippine Marine Force Recon
programme.desc: The hardiest of men must undergo 5 weeks of physical and psychological hell to train for a 1500ft jump. Only the brave can be part of the 800 Marines who will earn the right to be called Force Recon.

programme.title: Late Night With Seth Meyers
programme.desc: Emmy Award-nominated “Late Night with Seth Meyers,” hosted by award-winning writer and performer Seth Meyers, is home to incisive humor, topical jokes and A-list celebrity guests. programme.title: E2 - Varsity Blues
programme.desc: The Fugitive Task Force is called in to hunt down a missing teen from New Jersey who has a connection to a classmate's recent suicide. Meanwhile, Cora feels Ray and his father are putting too much pressure on Caleb.

programme.title: E21
programme.desc: Inspired by a true story and based on the hit eponymous Italian drama series, Doc begins its second season of the life-affirming medical drama following the heartbreak and victories of hard-charging, brilliant physician Dr. Amy Larsen (Molly Parker) as she rebuilds her life after a car crash erased eight years of her memory. This season, Amy will continue to confront hard truths about her missing years, work to repair fractured relationships and seek to reconcile the person she used to be with the one everyone else has come to know.

programme.title: Jurassic World: Fallen Kingdom
programme.desc: Owen and Claire return to the ruins of the Jurassic World theme park to rescue the remaining dinosaurs from a looming volcanic extinction.

programme.title: E2 - Bunny
programme.desc: When Jenny (Serinda Swan) is called to a luxe condo to investigate the death of a cannabis mogul, she enters an alternate world where nothing is as it seems.

programme.title: E4 - Clickbait

programme.desc: An attempt on a respected judge's life is connected to an anonymous video posted to the SVU tip line. Rollins tries to help a victim come to terms with their abuse.

programme.desc: A family discovers a young boy in grave danger when their baby monitor picks up a rogue frequency. Griffin goes to extremes to find the boy's location. Rollins finds herself alone with a predator.

programme.desc: An unconscious and injured teen abandoned outside a hospital sends the SVU on a search for the people who left her there. Benson faces serious consequences when she chooses to protect a victim's secret under the pressure of cross examination.

programme.title: Inheritors
programme.desc: Inheritors is a multi-media product from CGTN that shines a light on China's rich Intangible Cultural Heritage. programme.title: The Super Launching
programme.desc: The Super Launching is a geek program in the realm of popular science. Dedicated to showcasing new technologies, achievements, and breakthroughs from around the world, the program focuses on both highlighting existing hot topics and generating new ones, offering the audience a glimpse into the latest popular science and industry developments. Anchored in an innovative city with a global perspective, the Super Launching has established itself as the best platform for global premieres, debuts, and the launch of first stores.

programme.title: Trailblazing
programme.desc: The feature program 'Trailblazing' on Shenzhen TV fully illustrates Shenzhen's trailblazing exploration and demonstration role as a pilot demonstration zone for socialism with Chinese characteristics. programme.title: E31
programme.desc: In Onjeong Market, located in Onjeong, a town some distance away from Seoul, the area is buzzing with change as apartment complexes are built and plans for subway extensions and new town developments are announced. Across a single street stand a principled general hospital, Gongmyeongjeongdae Clinic, and traditional Korean clinic, Yangji Barun Clinic. The two families who run these places have been bitter enemies for years, bound by a long standing grudge from an incident in the past. Even the smallest matters turn into big fights, making them the most famous rival families in Onjeong. This is a family growth drama about these two families as they unravel their long held misunderstandings, heal their wounds, learn to love one another, and are reborn as one family.

programme.title: E5
programme.desc: The thoroughly city-bred Seong Taehun family suddenly finds themselves in the pristine yet unpredictable village of Yeonri-ri. Determined to return to Seoul, they face hilarious challenges, cultural clashes, and heartwarming moments. This family “reboot” drama captures their misadventures, resilience, and the unexpected bonds they form along the way.

programme.desc: After recovering from cancer, Geralyn's doctor encouraged her to embrace life with husband Art. Their journey leads to the ocean, where they are on a hunt to find a home that truly speaks to them.

programme.desc: A reality program that gives recognition to the most deserving and most hardworking Filipinos who toil through each day in order to earn a decent living for their families. The hosts take turns substituting for the Day Off winner at work, while he or she enjoys a luxurious day of fun and relaxation with his or her family.

programme.desc: After someone abducts a vivacious Ohio undergrad in broad daylight, local police join forces with the FBI.

programme.title: E8 - Mega Bites For Mega Bucks
programme.desc: In a house packed with oddities, Matt finds megalodon teeth, tribal masks and Civil War bullets. The team struggles to make the kitchen functional again.

programme.title: E1 - Ecuador
programme.desc: Ed travels to the Ecuadorian rainforest to meet the Waorani, hunting monkeys and crocodiles, making poison blow-darts.

programme.title: The ProtEGE
programme.desc: Rescued as a child by the legendary assassin Moody, Anna is the world's most skilled contract killer. However, when Moody is brutally killed, she vows revenge for the man who taught her everything she knows.

programme.title: The Con-Heartist
programme.desc: After catching a con-artist trying to swindle her Ina decides not to turn him in, but to send him after her cheating ex.

programme.title: On The Run
programme.desc: Crack policeman Hsiang Ming is having a talk with his separated wife when a bullet from hired killer Ah Chui kills the wife, an anti-drug policewoman. Hsiang Ming goes after the killer but is told to keep off by senior officer Lu. In fact, Lu is head of a narcotics ring and lover of Hsiang Ming's ex-wife. She knows his secret, thus Lu hires Ah Chui to kill her. Then Lu sets about to kill every one connected with crime-the go-between and Ah Chui. On his death bed, the go-between tells Hsiang Ming where to find Ah Chui. This Hsiang Ming does. But Lu's men are coming to kill both of them. Hsiang Ming has to fight off the attackers. Hsiang Ming takes Ah Chui to his mother-in-law's house where Ah Chui meets Hsiang Ming's daughter and feels shameful. When Lu's men come, she saves the young girl and an injured Hsiang Ming. As Hsiang Ming's friends fail to stop Lu, Ah Chui takes Hsiang Ming to a secret hide out and nurses him. They become lovers...

programme.title: Crime Story
programme.desc: Eddie Chan, a guilt-ridden cop trying to silence his demons from a recent shoot-out who is assigned to rescue kidnapped businessman Huang Yifei. It is a trail that leads Chan and his partner, Hung from Hong Kong to Taipei and back to Hong Kong. As the trail gets warmer, Chan begins to suspect that there are internal forces – including Hung – who seem to working against him...

programme.title: Doctor Vampire
programme.desc: Dr. Chiang, a Hong Kong surgeon, finds himself surrounded by beautiful girls in an old castle. Little does he realize these are the Count's vampire girls. He has a one-night stand with Alice who bites him while he was unaware. He gradually assumes the characteristics of a vampire. Alice breaks with the Count and goes to Hong Kong to save Dr. Chiang. That gets him into hot water with his girlfriend May...

programme.title: Superstars Comedy: God of Gamblers Part 3: Back to Shanghai
programme.desc: Coming back learning from the God of Gambler, Star accidentally falls into a time tunnel and back to Shanghai in 1937, where he meets his grandfather Fook, Yvonne and Danny...

programme.desc: An interactive programme that's as fun as it is informative and reactive to the meteorological events of the moment. programme.title: E11 - Pilot Of Le Havre
programme.desc: Le Havre is France's leading port for container ship navigation. Each day, around thirty international cargo vessels pass through it. programme.title: E5 - La Molignee
programme.desc: On the road to the province of Namur and the Molignee valley, a picturesque location of high biological value and a Natura 2000 site. Detours to Sosoye and Falaen, among the most beautiful villages in Wallonia, the Abbey of Maredsous, Biesmeree and Florennes.

programme.title: E2 - Long Live Legumes
programme.desc: On the menu: lentils papet vaudois style and crispy chickpeas for the aperitif. Discovery of the day: Geneva longeole cooked on the plancha. Annick Jeanmairet is once again assisted by comedian Brigitte Rosset.

programme.title: E8 - Organic Farming, Agriculture For The Future
programme.desc: In Polynesia, food consumption has relied primarily on imports for many years. But since the 1990s, independent farmers have been championing organic, locally based agriculture that respects the cycles of nature, as in ancient times.

programme.title: Madonna Actresses: Wild Dream Bus Party
Hohinata Miyu: Fluffy Breasts Of Temptation
Hohinata Miyu: Fluffy Breasts Of Temptation
Hohinata Miyu: Fluffy Breasts Of Temptation
Hohinata Miyu: Fluffy Breasts Of Temptation
E19
programme.desc: 當紅主播許妍（趙露思飾）和都會精英沈皓明（陳偉霆飾）是一對人人艷羨慕的夫妻，看似十分般配的兩人，由於出生環境的差異，始終難以融入對方的圈子。許妍靠著光鮮的主持人身分和「精心裝點」的身世順利和沈皓明步入婚姻，而這一切盡在沈皓明的掌握下。衝突來臨，許妍脫離沈皓明的掌控一去不回頭。沈皓明卻發現自己早已陷入愛情，想要全力追回許妍。經歷種種，兩人終於撕掉外表的偽裝，重新靠近，會見彼此的內在，也重新認識自己。

programme.title: E8
programme.desc: 一位正直的明星律師兼忠實粉絲，在偶像被指控謀殺後挺身而出，為他辯護。「孟世娜」是擁有豐富經歷的刑事辯護律師，同時是偶像團體Gold Boys的十年以上的忠實粉絲。在Gold Boys的主唱「都來益」因捲入殺人事件而成為嫌疑人時，她隱藏了自己的崇拜之情，為他辯護，並揭示了一個意想不到的真相。

programme.title: E5
programme.desc: 講述世界排名第一的拳擊選手李權淑在令全韓國為之瘋狂後突然引退並銷聲匿跡；某一天體育經理人的出現並提出了一個讓她無法拒絕的復出提議，而隨之發生的故事。

programme.title: E17
programme.desc: 二百年後兩個神祕的女人，突然出現在超級富有的丹氏家族，沒人知道她們是誰。但隨後這兩位女子意識到，在前世她們與丹氏家族的每位成員，都有着密不可分的關係。

programme.title: E5
programme.desc: 以日本尚未制度化的臥底誘捕調查為主題，森川葵在劇中飾演的是警視廳新設立小隊「STINGERS（臥底搜查檢證室）」的隊長——二階堂民子。她是警察廳的菁英份子，曾赴美接受 FBI 的正統「Sting Operation（臥底行動）」訓練，身為頂尖精英警視歸國。擅長偽裝、即興演技、心理操控與陷阱設計，是臥底搜查的專家。說話簡潔、指示神秘，經常以出人意表的行動讓部下摸不著頭緒，卻又總能在不知不覺間讓一切線索串連起來。這位充滿謎團的領導者，將帶領 STINGERS 成功解決各種案件。

programme.desc: 二百年後兩個神祕的女人，突然出現在超級富有的丹氏家族，沒人知道她們是誰。但隨後這兩位女子意識到，在前世她們與丹氏家族的每位成員，都有着密不可分的關係。

programme.title: Man Ki Aankhen

programme.title: Annapurna
programme.desc: On a sunny spring day, Kang Hyun goes hiking in Bugaksan Mountain with Sun Woo who has been recently discharged from the military. It is already past noon but they continue a casual conversation about their past relationships while hiking along trails. Kang Hyun reminisces about the bittersweet memories of his exes ‘Anna' and ‘Eun Chae', while Sun Woo regrets treating his ex ‘Eun Jung' badly and blames his immaturity in the past relationship with ‘Pureum'.Kang Hyun and Sun Woo come across different people along the trail. They pass by a good-looking woman in tight leggings who instantly capture their eyes. They also come across a middle-aged man who gives disappointing hiking tips, which make them feel hopeless. ‘Anna' and ‘Pureum' incarnate our bygone lovers who we once strongly admired but failed to reach.Though hiking is as tough as life can be, it can also bring you joy because some people come into our lives and make us happy.
